headline: DEXCOM INC (NASDAQ:DXCM) Screens as a Strong Growth Stock with Favorable Technical Setup
summary: DEXCOM INC (DXCM) shows strong growth with 27% EPS growth and healthy fundamentals, paired with a promising technical breakout setup near $75.38. A compelling blend of quality and timing for growth investors.
